name: d1-online-ide
description: Browser IDE with Docker-sandboxed execution, PTY terminal over WebSocket, and Yjs collaborative editing

scripts.setup: npm install && docker compose up -d db && npm run pull-images
scripts.pull-images: docker pull python:3.12-alpine && docker pull node:20-alpine
scripts.build: npm --workspace server run build && npm --workspace web run build
scripts.typecheck: npm --workspace server run typecheck && npm --workspace web run typecheck
